no dynamic or untrusted data flows.  \n- **Anomalies:** Large static bytecode, but this is normal for compiled contracts.  \n- **Analysis & Conclusion:** No signs of malicious payload or obfuscation; pattern matches standard autogenerated code.  \n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.2 (slightly higher due to the size of bytecode, but still within a safe, standard pattern).  \n**Note:** The security risk score of 0.2 is reasonable given the large bytecode but doesn't indicate malicious intent.\n\n---\n\n### Summary & Final Assessment:\n\n- **Malware Score:** All reports indicate zero malware risk.
